creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 200054
v1

Hi there

kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to upgrade PyQt5 to 5.11.3 (and sip and qscintilla with it).

The patch is attached and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/py-qt5-5.11.3.v1.diff

mfg Tobias
